compiled_state.title: check-acceptance-criteria.sh still uses YAML frontmatter parsing — needs v3 JSON migration like issue-quality-check.sh
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Classification: mechanical. check-acceptance-criteria.sh runs awk directly on ticket show JSON output looking for ## Acceptance Criteria headings, but v3 ticket show returns JSON where description/comments are nested fields. Fix: extract text via python3 JSON parsing first (same pattern as issue-quality-check.sh), then run awk on extracted text.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
